key_insight: PhononScore is a fast, phonon-aware scoring function that ranks crystal structures by dynamical stability without expensive explicit phonon calculations.
engineering_relevance: It provides a practical stability filter for high-throughput materials discovery, enabling second-level reranking of generated crystals in screening, active learning, and reinforcement learning loops.
method: Trained on a multi-fidelity phonon dataset of 157,463 crystal structures.
Predicts a unified stability score directly from crystal structures.
Optionally fine-tuned with DFT-PBE phonon data for high-fidelity screening.
evidence_signal: On PhononBench, it raised average candidate-pool stability from 30.7% to 83.7% across nine generation models, with Top-10 stability reaching 97.5%; on a DFT benchmark, PhononScore-DFT achieved 93.0% Top-100 stability.
watch_item: Performance depends on the quality and coverage of the training data, so out-of-distribution crystal chemistries may still require explicit phonon verification.
paper_title: PhononScore: a phonon-aware scoring function for dynamical stability
